sentences.arabic: يَسْتَحْضِرُ أَرِيجُ الْأَسْوَاقِ الْقَدِيمَةِ فِي دِمَشْقَ وَالْقَاهِرَةِ عُصُوراً غَابِرَةً مِنْ أَمْجَادِ طَرِيقِ الْحَرِيرِ الْعَظِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Miris starih bazara u Damasku i Kairu priziva prohujala vremena slavnoog Puta svile.
sentences.translationEn: The fragrance of the ancient souks in Damascus and Cairo evokes bygone eras of the great Silk Road's glory.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ كَانَتِ التَّوَابِلُ يَوْماً مَا عُمْلَةَ الْإِمْبِرَاطُورِيَّاتِ، وَالْمُحَرِّكَ الَّذِي دَفَعَ الْمُسْتَكْشِفِينَ لِخَوْضِ غِمَارِ الْبِحَارِ الْمَحْفُوفَةِ بِالْمَخَاطِرِ.
sentences.translation: Začini su nekada bili valuta imperija i pokretač koji je istraživače tjerao u dubine mora ispunjenih opasnostima.
sentences.translationEn: Spices were once the currency of empires and the engine that drove explorers to brave the depths of peril-laden seas.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي جِرْنِ الْهَاوَنِ، يَخْضَعُ مَزِيجُ الْهَيْلِ وَالْقِرْفَةِ وَالْقَرَنْفُلِ لِتَحَوُّلٍ جَذْرِيٍّ لِيُصْبِحَ هُوِيَّةً عِطْرِيَّةً فَرِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: U avanu, mješavina kardamoma, cimeta i karanfilića prolazi kroz radikalnu transformaciju kako bi postala jedinstveni mirisni identitet.
sentences.translationEn: In the mortar, the mixture of cardamom, cinnamon, and cloves undergoes a radical transformation to become a unique aromatic identity.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْكِيمْيَاءُ فِي التَّتْبِيلِ لَيْسَتْ عَبَثِيَّةً، بَلْ تَتَّبِعُ نِسَباً تَقْلِيدِيَّةً صَارِمَةً تُوَازِنُ بَيْنَ الْحَرَارَةِ وَالْحُمُوضَةِ وَالْحَلَاوَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova hemija začinjavanja nije slučajna, već prati stroge tradicionalne omjere koji balansiraju ljutinu, kiselost i slatkoću.
sentences.translationEn: This alchemy of seasoning is not arbitrary; rather, it follows strict traditional ratios that balance heat, acidity, and sweetness.

sentences.arabic: وَبَعِيداً عَنْ فَائِدَتِهَا فِي الطَّهْوِ، كَانَتْ هَذِهِ الْكُنُوزُ النَّبَاتِيَّةُ تُبَجَّلُ لِخَصَائِصِهَا الطِّبِّيَّةِ وَقُدْرَتِهَا الْفَائِقَةِ عَلَى التَّطْهِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Osim njihove koristi u kuhanju, ova biljna blaga bila su slavljena zbog svojih ljekovitih svojstava i vrhunske sposobnosti pročišćavanja.
sentences.translationEn: Beyond their utility in cooking, these botanical treasures were revered for their medicinal properties and superior cleansing abilities.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ إِتْقَانَ خَلَطَاتِ الْبَهَارَاتِ يَعْكِسُ فَهْماً عَمِيقاً لِلْعُلُومِ الْكِيمْيَائِيَّةِ الْمُتَوَارِيَةِ خَلْفَ سِتَارِ الْعَادَاتِ الْمُتَوَارَثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovladavanje mješavinama začina odražava duboko razumijevanje hemijskih nauka skrivenih iza zastora naslijeđenih običaja.
sentences.translationEn: Mastering spice blends reflects a profound understanding of the chemical sciences hidden behind the veil of inherited customs.

sentences.arabic: وَالْيَوْمَ، لَا تَزَالُ الْأَلْوَانُ الزَّاهِيَةُ لِلْكُرْكُمِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ فِي الْأَسْوَاقِ تَشْهَدُ عَلَى الْإِرْثِ الْخَالِدِ لِتِجَارَةِ التَّوَابِلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Danas, jarke boje kurkume i šafrana na tržnicama i dalje svjedoče o vječnom naslijeđu arapske trgovine začinima.
sentences.translationEn: Today, the vibrant colors of turmeric and saffron in the marketplaces continue to testify to the eternal legacy of the Arab spice trade.
